name: Sherried Cheddar Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cheddar cheese and sherry in a bowl and stir until well mixed.
2. Add the sour cream to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Gradually add the hot sauce, garlic powder, and jalapeno pepper to the mixture.
4. Stir until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
5. Serve at room temperature.
6. Makes about 2 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Celery, Carrots, Radishes, Tomatoes, Polish Sausage, Cantaloupe, Crenshaw or Casaba Melon.
